title: The Rise of Relational Intelligence
caption: Are you ready to deepen your connections?
layout: 2-column comparison. Left column shows characteristics of low relational intelligence: poor communication, emotional disconnect, routine interactions. Right column highlights traits of high relational intelligence: empathetic listening, emotional depth, vibrant conversations.

caption: How do you perceive the changes you’re facing?
layout: Cycle diagram illustrating the midlife journey in stages: Awareness, Acceptance, Adaptation, and Action, with concise descriptions for each stage.
